Ntc Of Mtn For Order Compelling Inspection Of Premises And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Michael J. Hanley, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Leslie Esquibel
Tania Johnson, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: California Culinary Academy

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted with modification. Plaintiff Leslie Esquibel's motion to compel an inspection is granted in part. Plaintiff shall be permitted to inspect, photograph and measure the Garde Manger area on a date mutually convenient to the parties. The inspection shall not exceed one hour. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied.
MODIFICATION. Specify inspection limited to doorway.
In addition plaintiff shall provide releases for physical therapy records by May 21, 2008. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.
